video.title: Internet Hate, Physique Comments and the Fat-Loss Context
video.description:
This is Part 3 from the full Speediance/Fitness Tech workout discussion. I talk through internet comments after clips started getting more reach, physique critiques, assumptions about visceral fat, and why body-composition context gets flattened when people see a short clip.

I also cover the honest context around fat loss, age, GLP-1 medication, TRT, staying active while sick, and why I try not to pretend the process is cleaner than it actually is.

Full episode: https://youtu.be/GzqAzoSKBWQ

Not medical or training advice. This is personal experience and commentary; talk to qualified professionals for your own health, medication, weight loss, and training decisions.

Chapters:
00:00 Internet comments after clips got popular  
01:30 Fat-loss timing, flu, and expectations  
03:00 Visceral fat claims and physique context  
04:30 Distended-gut examples and body changes  
06:00 The comment I deleted  
07:30 Shorts, captions, and losing control of edits  
09:00 When a rough clip was still worth posting  
10:30 Medications, age, and honest context  

#FatLoss #FitnessTech #FitnessCommentary
